Localization.Description: Attempt to perform an operation on a cloud

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} is unable to delete cloud {object.name} on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is unable to change cloud {object.name} on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is changing cloud {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is deleting cloud {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is renaming cloud {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to create cloud {object.name} on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is creating cloud {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to rename cloud {object.name} on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
